workflow_details.description: Add information that will help to differentiate this workflow from another.
workflow_details.title: Workflow Details

data_source.description: Select one of your configured data sources.

dji_api_key.description: Your DJI developer key, used to decrypt .txt flight logs (only needed when a Flight Logs Folder is set). Get one free at developer.dji.com (create an Open API app, activate via email, copy the ApiKey).
dji_api_key.title: DJI API Key

input_folder.description: Full path to the folder of DJI .txt flight logs (blank = skip flight-log ingestion). Copy the logs folder off your DJI controller via USB and paste the path here.
input_folder.title: Flight Logs Folder

event_type_name.description: The slug of your Flight Folio event type in EarthRanger. Blank = tracking-only mode (GPS tracks posted, no Flight Folio events).
event_type_name.title: Flight Folio Event Type

aircraft_identity.description: Identifies the drone as an EarthRanger Subject by its serial number. The Subject and Source are created automatically if absent; these fields set their type/subtype. Only used when a Flight Logs Folder is set.
aircraft_identity.title: Aircraft Identity

decimation_rate.description: How many GPS fixes per second to post to EarthRanger from flight logs. DJI logs at ~10 Hz; the default 1 Hz gives smooth tracks with 10x data reduction. Performance stats always use full-resolution data.
decimation_rate.title: Track Decimation Rate

operational_defaults.description: Operational settings applied to every flight in this batch. Leave Nature of Flight blank for mixed batches — it can be set per-flight later in EarthRanger.
operational_defaults.title: Flight Defaults

photos_folder.description: Full path to the folder of drone photos (.jpg) copied from the aircraft SD card (blank = skip imagery). Photos must retain their original camera metadata.
photos_folder.title: Photos Folder

imagery_event_type.description: The slug of your UAS Imagery event type in EarthRanger. Blank = preview mode (photos geolocated and shown on the map, nothing posted).
imagery_event_type.title: Imagery Event Type

dem_path.description: Optional path to a local DEM GeoTIFF (geographic lat/lon CRS) for the photo raycast. Leave blank to auto-download Copernicus GLO-30 for your photos' area — set a path only for offline use or to use your own elevation data.
dem_path.title: DEM File

time_defaults.description: Fallback UTC offset for photo timestamps, used only when a photo lacks GPS time metadata (most drone photos carry GPS time and ignore this).
time_defaults.title: Time Defaults

patrol_type.description: The slug of an existing EarthRanger patrol type (blank = no patrols). Flights are filed as patrols of this type, and photos are linked to the patrol whose time range contains them.
patrol_type.title: Patrol Type
